content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Auto (+1.73%), IT (+1.14%), PSU Banks (+1.54%), and Bank Nifty (+1.01%) leading. VIX cooling to 17.37 (-3%) supports risk-on. Existing book is well-positioned across financials, defence, infra, and chemicals — focus is on trailing SLs to lock gains rather than aggressive new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.66,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +7.7% with CMP 1057. Stored SL 1040.66 is already ~1.6% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline. No-op MODIFY would be wasted; HOLD instead. (Switching to HOLD)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +7.7%, CMP 1057.10 vs SL 1040.66 (~1.6% below). Trail rule (b) suggests SL to max(984, 1057×0.98=1036) — current SL 1040 already exceeds that. Target 1110 within reach (+5%). Q4 beat, ICICI Sec TP 1350, dividend pending. Letting it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.1%, CMP 123.78. SL 119 (~3.9% below) intact. Gold consolidating near upper end of range; defensive hedge thesis intact. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1715.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.0%, CMP 1736 at all-time high. Stored SL 1715 is only ~1.2% below CMP — at the discipline floor. Trim target to 1800 (just below MOSL TP 1900 but achievable near-term, R:R from entry 1700: reward 100 vs risk 0 from SL — already breakeven-protected). No SL change since stored 1715 already gives 1% gap; lowering target acknowledges Elara downgrade and ATH compression. Actually keeping SL same and target same = no-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1736 at ATH; SL 1715 already locks in +0.9% gain (above entry 1700). Target 1820 still feasible given MOSL TP 1900. SL-to-CMP gap 1.2% is at floor — no further tighten without forcing exit. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.3%, CMP 208.13 just below entry 209. SL 206 (~1.0% below). Q4 beat (+68% PAT), Emkay TP 220, MFI stress easing. Position essentially flat; let thesis play."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.7%, CMP 4655. Stored SL = entry 4575 (already breakeven). Trail rule (b) at +4% threshold not yet triggered. However May 14 Q4 board meeting is 6 sessions away — outside the 3-session binary cooldown but worth flagging. No-op vs stored — HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7% with SL at breakeven. Q4 results May 14 (8 sessions out) — re-evaluate at T-3. Defence orderbook 3.2x revenue, target 4875 (+4.7%) within reach. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -2.3%, CMP 1438 vs SL 1420 (~1.3% below). Q4 results yesterday were strong (+125% PAT, net cash) but stock failed to follow through today. Letting SL absorb. If 1420 breaks, exit triggers."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6950.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 6950 = entry 6900+50 (slight breakeven+). CMP 7030 puts SL ~1.1% below — at floor. No-op. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.2%, CMP 7030 vs SL 6950 (~1.1% gap, at floor). FY26 PAT +130%, Chemours commissioning Jun-Jul catalyst. Target 7400 achievable. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.2%, CMP 842. Today gap-up +9.5% to 842 from yesterday close 769; intraday faded from high 862 to 842. Tightening SL from 800 to 820 (~2.6% below CMP, satisfies 1% floor) protects against gap-fill scenario while leaving room. SL is monotonic-up (raising 800→820). Target 900 unchanged. R:R from CMP: reward 58 / risk 22 = 2.6:1."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 25,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1730.00,
      "stop_loss": 1675.00,
      "target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Bullish engulfing on 2026-04-30 daily; massive volume breakout May 4 (+7.6% on 4.8x volume) followed by sustained move to 1730. Q3 PAT +28.7% YoY, FY26 results May 8 (T+2 = binary 3-session window). Sizing as event-trade per Rule 11: ~4.3% of capital (₹43.2k), tighter SL 3.2% (1675), R:R = 90/55 = 1.64:1. Confidence 0.62 — wait, Rule 11 requires conf ≥0.70 for event trades within 3 sessions. CHANGING to NO_ACTION."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CHOLAHLDNG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "FY26 results May 8 = 2 sessions away. Rule 11 requires confidence ≥0.70 for event-trade entries within 3 sessions. My conviction is 0.62 (volume signal good but holdco discount + Q4 binary risk). Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already held — no add. Ignore this entry."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1040.66 already 1.6% below CMP 1057 — at trail floor. Target 1110 in reach."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -1.1% within tolerance. SL 119 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1715 already locks +0.9% above entry. CMP 1736 ATH; gap to SL 1.2% at floor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat at -0.3%, SL 206 intact. Q4 thesis alive."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.7%, SL at breakeven. Q4 May 14 — re-evaluate at T-3."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-2.3%, SL 1420 close — letting it absorb. Q4 print was strong; today's fade likely profit-taking."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+2.2%, SL at breakeven+50. Chemours catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "reasoning": "Gap-up +9.5% but faded from 862 high to 842. Tighten SL 800→820 (2.6% below CMP) to protect against gap-fill. Monotonic raise."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "CHOLAHLDNG: holdco rerating possible post May 8 results — revisit T+1 with fresh data. POLYCAB: Q4 results today after-market — wait for print before any entry. CAMS, COFORGE, M&M, VEDL: all post-result gap-ups; chase risk too high without intraday weakness setup. HFCL, ABCAPITAL: monitor for breakout retest. RRKABEL: 8.2x volume with flat price = accumulation flag, watch for follow-through. AUROPHARMA, BIOCON: pharma defensive — track if volatility spikes.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 43%, well below 80% soft target. Book is balanced: financials (PNBHOUSING, BANDHANBNK), defence (HAL), infra (ADANIPORTS, TITAGARH), realty (SOBHA), chemicals (NAVINFLUOR), gold hedge (GOLDBEES). No cluster overconcentration. Day-17 of 180; 5-day perf shows 17% win rate but 1.5x profit factor — small wins frequent enough. Today's stance: trail TITAGARH SL, hold the rest, no new entries given multiple Q4 binaries (HAL May 14, CHOLAHLDNG May 8) on the watchlist already and post-result chase risk on the rest."
}
